mapper.sql: id, assetNum, assetName, assetCategory, assetType, assetHost, assetOpenPorts, assetDeployInfo, assetUsage, customerName, industryCode, assetAS, assetASVersion, assetASIdentify, assetASFramework, middlewareName, middlewareVersion, developerBrand, assetOS, assetOSVersion, assetDB, assetDBVersion, customInfo, status, trackStatus, trackedTime, disabled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into af_industry_asset (id, assetNum, assetName, assetCategory, assetType, assetHost, assetOpenPorts, assetDeployInfo, assetUsage, customerName, industryCode, assetAS, assetASVersion, assetASIdentify, assetASFramework, middlewareName, middlewareVersion, developerBrand, assetOS, assetOSVersion, assetDB, assetDBVersion, customInfo, status, trackStatus, trackedTime, disabled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetOpenPorts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetDeployInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetUsage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{industryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetAS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetASVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetASIdentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetASFramework,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{middlewareName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{middlewareVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{developerBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetOS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetOSVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetDB,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetDBVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

id,
assetNum,

assetCategory,

assetUsage,

mapper.update:
update af_industry_asset
assetNum = #{assetNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetName = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetCategory = #{assetCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetType = #{assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetHost = #{assetHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetOpenPorts = #{assetOpenPorts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetDeployInfo = #{assetDeployInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetUsage = #{assetUsage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerName = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
industryCode = #{industryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetAS = #{assetAS,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetASVersion = #{assetASVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetASIdentify = #{assetASIdentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetASFramework = #{assetASFramework,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
middlewareName = #{middlewareName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
middlewareVersion = #{middlewareVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
developerBrand = #{developerBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetOS = #{assetOS,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetOSVersion = #{assetOSVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetDB = #{assetDB,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetDBVersion = #{assetDBVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}),
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trackStatus = #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trackedTime = #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update af_industry_asset set assetNum = #{assetNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetName = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetCategory = #{assetCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetType = #{assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetHost = #{assetHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetOpenPorts = #{assetOpenPorts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetDeployInfo = #{assetDeployInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetUsage = #{assetUsage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerName = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, industryCode = #{industryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetAS = #{assetAS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetASVersion = #{assetASVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetASIdentify = #{assetASIdentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetASFramework = #{assetASFramework,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, middlewareName = #{middlewareName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, middlewareVersion = #{middlewareVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, developerBrand = #{developerBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetOS = #{assetOS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetOSVersion = #{assetOSVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetDB = #{assetDB,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetDBVersion = #{assetDBVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}), status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trackStatus = #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trackedTime = #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: ( ia.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from af_industry_asset as ia
ia.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.assetNum = #{assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetName = #{assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetCategory = #{assetCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetType = #{assetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetHost = #{assetHost, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOpenPorts = #{assetOpenPorts, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDeployInfo = #{assetDeployInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetUsage = #{assetUsage, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.customerName = #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.industryCode = #{industryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetAS = #{assetAS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASVersion = #{assetASVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASIdentify = #{assetASIdentify, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASFramework = #{assetASFramework, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareName = #{middlewareName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareVersion = #{middlewareVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.developerBrand = #{developerBrand, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOS = #{assetOS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOSVersion = #{assetOSVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDB = #{assetDB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDBVersion = #{assetDBVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.customInfo = #{customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ia.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.trackStatus = #{trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.trackedTime = #{trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ia.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select count(1) from af_industry_asset as ia
ia.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.assetNum = #{assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetName = #{assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetCategory = #{assetCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetType = #{assetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetHost = #{assetHost, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOpenPorts = #{assetOpenPorts, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDeployInfo = #{assetDeployInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetUsage = #{assetUsage, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.customerName = #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.industryCode = #{industryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetAS = #{assetAS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASVersion = #{assetASVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASIdentify = #{assetASIdentify, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASFramework = #{assetASFramework, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareName = #{middlewareName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareVersion = #{middlewareVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.developerBrand = #{developerBrand, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOS = #{assetOS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOSVersion = #{assetOSVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDB = #{assetDB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDBVersion = #{assetDBVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.customInfo = #{customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ia.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.trackStatus = #{trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.trackedTime = #{trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ia.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select JSON_SET(IFNULL(ia.`customInfo`, "{}"), '$.statusName', bd.basicDataName, '$.trackStatusName', bd2.basicDataName ) as customInfo, ia.* from af_industry_asset as ia left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on ia.`status` = bd.`basicDataId` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'processStatus' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd2 on ia.`trackStatus` = bd2.`basicDataId` and bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'trackStatus'
ia.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.assetNum = #{model.assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetName like concat("%", #{model.assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetCategory = #{model.assetCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetType = #{model.assetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetHost like concat("%", #{model.assetHost, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetOpenPorts like concat("%", #{model.assetOpenPorts, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetDeployInfo like concat("%", #{model.assetDeployInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetUsage like concat("%", #{model.assetUsage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.customerName like concat("%", #{model.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.industryCode like concat("%", #{model.industryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetAS = #{model.assetAS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASVersion like concat("%", #{model.assetASVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetASIdentify like concat("%", #{model.assetASIdentify, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetASFramework = #{model.assetASFramework, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareName like concat("%", #{model.middlewareName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.middlewareVersion like concat("%", #{model.middlewareVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.developerBrand like concat("%", #{model.developerBrand, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetOS = #{model.assetOS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOSVersion like concat("%", #{model.assetOSVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.assetDB = #{model.assetDB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDBVersion like concat("%", #{model.assetDBVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ia.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ia.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ia.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( ia.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from af_industry_asset as ia
ia.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.assetNum = #{model.assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetName like concat("%", #{model.assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND

( ia.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
